title: rhinanthus angustifolius subsp. halophilus
intro: Rhinanthus angustifolius subsp. halophilus, also known as the halophilous or salt-loving yellow rattle, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the broomrape family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rhinanthus angustifolius subsp. halophilus include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and aid in the management of respiratory problems. Rhinanthus angustifolius subsp. halophilus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
